ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL associated with the user */,
  "protected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's tweets are protected */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the user */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of accounts the user is following */,
  "tweet_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets by the user */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is included in */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the profile image of the user */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., personal, business) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "root_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the root tweet that started the conversation */,
  "participants_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the conversation */,
  "tweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets in the conversation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conversation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conversation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "places" (
  "geo_place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical place */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the place */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the place */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "bounding_box" TEXT /* Bounding box coordinates for the place */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of impressions */,
  "engagement_score" TEXT /* Engagement score of the tweet */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of accounts the user is following */,
  "tweet_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets by the user */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is included in */,
  "account_age" INTEGER /* Age of the user's account in days */,
  "average_tweets_per_day" TEXT /* Average number of tweets posted by the user per day */,
  "average_likes_per_tweet" TEXT /* Average number of likes per tweet */,
  "average_retweets_per_tweet" TEXT /* Average number of retweets per tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the link */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL extracted from the tweet */,
  "display_text" TEXT /* Display text associated with the URL */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., image, video, webpage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of media */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the media */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., photo, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to the media */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the media */,
  "media_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media in bytes */,
  "media_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the media in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "keyword_description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
